description.s: The storage layer wrapping IndexedDB with validation, caching, and ID-prefix isolation for
support. Receives the raw IndexedDB handle and instance ID from the
Fetch item by ID, throws if not found
: If the item is a code item, ensures no other code item in the same namespace has the same name.
The storage module owns ID prefixing directly:
The bootloader passes the raw IndexedDB handle and instance ID. Storage handles all prefixing and stripping internally, enabling true isolation while sharing the same IndexedDB.
— Bounded type chain walking, circular reference detection, validation rules
— How the bootloader opens IndexedDB and hands off to the kernel

Storage.name: Storage
Storage.description: Storage layer — wraps IndexedDB with ID-prefix isolation and in-memory caching.

Storage.instanceId.name: instanceId
Storage.instanceId.description: Get the nested instance ID (null for main instance).

Storage.initialize.name: initialize
Storage.initialize.description: Initialize storage (no-op — db is already open).

Storage._idbGetAll.name: _idbGetAll
Storage._idbGetAll.description: Fetch all items in this instance's namespace (with prefixes stripped).

Storage.get.name: get
Storage.get.description: Retrieve an item by ID. Throws if not found.

Storage.delete.name: delete
Storage.delete.description: Delete an item from storage and cache.

Storage.query.name: query
Storage.query.description: Find items matching a filter object (key-value pairs matched against item fields).

Storage.getAll.name: getAll
Storage.getAll.description: Get all items (excludes nested instance items). Populates cache on first call.

Storage.getAllRaw.name: getAllRaw
Storage.getAllRaw.description: Get all items including nested instance items.

Storage.deleteByPrefix.name: deleteByPrefix
Storage.deleteByPrefix.description: Delete all items whose ID starts with a prefix.

Storage.exists.name: exists
Storage.exists.description: Check if an item exists in storage.

Storage._validateItem.name: _validateItem
Storage._validateItem.description: Validate an item before storage — checks type chain and code name uniqueness.

params.name: kernel
params.description: Kernel reference for code item checks
